first_draft.name: First Draft
first_draft.description: Publish your very first book. A monumental first step on a long journey.
first_draft.imageprompt: A flat, minimalist vector illustration of a single fountain pen nib with a drop of ink falling from it. Clean geometric shapes, cozy aesthetic, soft palette of warm grey and gold, gentle flat shading, no realism.

prolific.name: Prolific
prolific.description: Publish 10 books. The words are flowing and your library is growing.
prolific.imageprompt: A flat, minimalist vector illustration of a tall, leaning stack of colorful simplified books. Clean geometric shapes, cozy aesthetic, warm palette of muted primary colors, gentle flat shading, no realism.

hustler.name: Hustler
hustler.description: Reach level 10 in three different Menial Work jobs. You know the value of hard work.
hustler.imageprompt: A flat, minimalist vector illustration of a simple rolled-up sleeve with a determined fist. Clean geometric shapes, cozy aesthetic, muted palette of warm ochre and soft brown, gentle flat shading, no realism.

creative_spark.name: Creative Spark
creative_spark.description: Reach level 10 in three different Creative Industry jobs. You're making a name for yourself.
creative_spark.imageprompt: A flat, minimalist vector illustration of a simple glowing lightbulb with a small pencil tip at its base. Clean geometric shapes, cozy aesthetic, soft palette of warm gold and cream, gentle flat shading, no realism.

literary_insider.name: Literary Insider
literary_insider.description: Reach level 10 in three different Literary Elite jobs. You walk in the halls of power.
literary_insider.imageprompt: A flat, minimalist vector illustration of a simple golden key with a book shape for its head. Clean geometric shapes, cozy aesthetic, palette of deep navy and soft gold, gentle flat shading, no realism.

focused_mind.name: Focused Mind
focused_mind.description: Reach level 100 in the Focus skill. Distractions are a thing of the past.
focused_mind.imageprompt: A flat, minimalist vector illustration of a simple human head silhouette with calm, concentric circles radiating from the center. Clean geometric shapes, cozy aesthetic, soft palette of muted blue and white, gentle flat shading, no realism.

speed_demon.name: Speed Demon
speed_demon.description: Reach level 100 in the Typing Speed skill. Your fingers fly across the keyboard.
speed_demon.imageprompt: A flat, minimalist vector illustration of a simple hand with motion lines trailing from the fingertips over a keyboard shape. Clean geometric shapes, cozy aesthetic, palette of electric blue and soft grey, gentle flat shading, no realism.

wordsmith.name: Wordsmith
wordsmith.description: Reach level 100 in the Grammar & Prose skill. Every sentence is a work of art.
wordsmith.imageprompt: A flat, minimalist vector illustration of a simple quill pen elegantly writing a glowing, stylized signature. Clean geometric shapes, cozy aesthetic, palette of deep charcoal and soft gold, gentle flat shading, no realism.

landlord.name: Landlord
landlord.description: Purchase the Large House. A home to call your own.
landlord.imageprompt: A flat, minimalist vector illustration of a simple house key hanging from a small house-shaped keychain. Clean geometric shapes, cozy aesthetic, warm palette of bronze and soft brown, gentle flat shading, no realism.

tech_savvy.name: Tech Savvy
tech_savvy.description: Own both the Pro Writing Software and a Home Office. You have the ultimate writer's setup.
tech_savvy.imageprompt: A flat, minimalist vector illustration of a simple laptop with a small gear icon and a checkmark on its screen. Clean geometric shapes, cozy aesthetic, palette of slate blue and cream, gentle flat shading, no realism.

reborn.name: Reborn
reborn.description: Experience your first rebirth. The cycle begins anew, but with wisdom.
reborn.imageprompt: A flat, minimalist vector illustration of a simple phoenix silhouette with glowing feathers, rising from a small pile of ash. Clean geometric shapes, cozy aesthetic, warm palette of orange, gold, and cream, gentle flat shading, no realism.

centenarian.name: Centenarian
centenarian.description: Reach 100 years of age. A lifetime of stories to tell.
centenarian.imageprompt: A flat, minimalist vector illustration of a simple hourglass with the sand nearly all in the bottom, beside a small sapling growing. Clean geometric shapes, cozy aesthetic, palette of soft sand and muted green, gentle flat shading, no realism.

millionaire.name: Millionaire
millionaire.description: Have over $1,000,000 in your bank account at one time.
millionaire.imageprompt: A flat, minimalist vector illustration of a simple thick stack of banknotes held together by a golden money clip. Clean geometric shapes, cozy aesthetic, palette of muted green and soft gold, gentle flat shading, no realism.

famous.description: Reach 100 Fame. Your name is known in literary circles.
famous.imageprompt: A flat, minimalist vector illustration of a simple golden star with smaller stars orbiting it. Clean geometric shapes, cozy aesthetic, palette of bright gold and deep blue, gentle flat shading, no realism.

masterpiece.description: Publish a book with a quality of 95% or higher. A true work of genius.
masterpiece.imageprompt: A flat, minimalist vector illustration of a simple open book with a glowing golden crown hovering above its pages. Clean geometric shapes, cozy aesthetic, palette of ivory, gold, and soft red, gentle flat shading, no realism.

collector.name: The Collector
collector.description: Own every single Miscellaneous item at the same time.
collector.imageprompt: A flat, minimalist vector illustration of a simple treasure chest, slightly open, with a soft golden glow emanating from within. Clean geometric shapes, cozy aesthetic, warm palette of wood brown and gold, gentle flat shading, no realism.

jack_of_all_trades.name: Jack of All Trades
jack_of_all_trades.description: Reach level 10 in at least one job from each of the three work categories.
jack_of_all_trades.imageprompt: A flat, minimalist vector illustration of three simple, overlapping tools: a wrench, a paintbrush, and a fountain pen. Clean geometric shapes, cozy aesthetic, palette of muted primary colors, gentle flat shading, no realism.

dedicated.name: Dedicated
dedicated.description: Reach level 50 in any single job. You've mastered your trade.
dedicated.imageprompt: A flat, minimalist vector illustration of a simple golden medal hanging from a red, white, and blue ribbon. Clean geometric shapes, cozy aesthetic, warm color palette, gentle flat shading, no realism.

scholar.name: Scholar

scholar.imageprompt: A flat, minimalist vector illustration of a simple graduation cap with a golden tassel. Clean geometric shapes, cozy aesthetic, palette of deep blue and soft gold, gentle flat shading, no realism.

legendary.imageprompt: A flat, minimalist vector illustration of a simple book whose pages are turning into a glowing galaxy of stars. Clean geometric shapes, cozy aesthetic, palette of deep indigo and sparkling gold, gentle flat shading, no realism.
